packageSummary:
**Summary:**
The 'Customizable - Escape To Kerala' package is an 8-day journey that takes you through the breathtaking landscapes and culture of Kerala. This tour includes visits to iconic landmarks such as the Dutch Palace, St. Francis Church, Jewish Synagogue, and Chinese fishing nets in Kochi. You will also explore the beautiful hill station of Munnar, visit the Eravikulam National Park, Mattupetty Dam, and Old Munnar Town. Additionally, you will experience the scenic backwaters of Alleppey and visit the beautiful beach town of Kovalam. This customizable package is designed to provide you with a unique and memorable experience in Kerala.

**Inclusions:**

- Accommodation in the mentioned or similar hotels.
- Meals as per Itinerary.
- All transfers, sightseeing and intercity travel using A/c vehicle.
- Services of a professional, friendly and multilingual representative.

**Exclusions:**

- Any Air or Rail fare.
- Any other meal not mentioned in price includes.
- Tips & Porterage.
- Any monument entrance fees, camera fees, guide charges.
- Any expenses of personal nature.
- GST @ Current Rate.
- The tour cost does not include POE charges & passport charges.
- No porterage included.
- Any expenses of personal nature such as porterage, laundry expenses, mini-bar, mineral water, telephone charges, food & drink that are not a part of the package.
- Additional Meals that is not mentioned in the above itinerary.
- Cost of excursions, city sightseeing, entrance fees & local guides availed of by the passengers, other than that mentioned in the above itinerary.
- Cost of Optional Excursions.
- Land surcharges due to Local Events applicable on certain departures.

**Summary:**

The 'Honeymoon Special - Maldives - Reethi Faru - 04 Nights 05 Days' package is a 5-day tour that offers an unforgettable experience for couples in the beautiful Maldives. The itinerary includes 4 nights of accommodation in a Deluxe Beach Bungalow, full board meal plan, and return seaplane transfers. Participants will enjoy the stunning scenery of the islands, relax on the pristine beaches, and enjoy a range of exciting activities, including snorkeling and diving. The package also includes travel insurance for the travel duration and a green tax. The price for this package starts at $1,226.93 per person.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Male, Meals: Dinner
- Arrive at Male airport and transfer to the hotel (standard 1400 hrs.).
- Check-in at the hotel and enjoy the rest of the day at leisure.

**Day 2:** Male, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner
- Enjoy breakfast at the hotel.
- Spend the day relaxing on the beach or exploring the island on your own.

**Day 3:** Male, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner
- Enjoy breakfast at the hotel.
- Spend the day relaxing on the beach or exploring the island on your own.

**Day 4:** Male, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner
- Enjoy breakfast at the hotel.
- Spend the day relaxing on the beach or exploring the island on your own.

**Day 5:** Departure, Meals: Breakfast
- After breakfast, check out (standard 1200 hrs.).
- Transfer from the hotel to International Airport for the departure flight back to India or to your onwards destination.

**Inclusions:**

- 04 Night’s accommodation in Deluxe Beach Bungalow
- Meal Plan as per selection – Full Board
- Return Seaplane transfers
- Green Tax
- Travel Insurance (up to age of 60 yrs.) for the travel duration

**Exclusions:**

- TCS & GST
- International Airfare & Visa Charges
- Guaranteed early check in or late check-out
- Any expenses of personal nature
- Tips and porterage
- Meals other than that what is mentioned in your itinerary
- Drinks including Water during meals / sightseeing tours are not included
- RT-PCR Test
- Any services not mentioned in the inclusions list

**Highlights:**

- Enjoy the stunning scenery of the islands and relax on the pristine beaches
- Enjoy a range of exciting activities, including snorkeling and diving
- Take advantage of the full board meal plan and return seaplane transfers
- Benefit from travel insurance for the travel duration and a green tax
- Create unforgettable memories with your loved one in the beautiful Maldives.

**Summary:**

The 'Honeymoon Special - Maldives - Villa Park 04 Nights 05 Days' package is a 5-day tour that offers a romantic getaway to the beautiful Maldives. The itinerary includes visits to the stunning beaches, crystal-clear waters, and luxurious villas of the Maldives. Participants will enjoy relaxing days at leisure, exploring the island on their own, and experiencing the beauty of the Maldives.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Male
- Arrive at Male International Airport and transfer to the hotel
- Check-in at the hotel and spend the day at leisure

**Day 2:** Male
- Enjoy breakfast at the hotel
- Spend the day at leisure, exploring the island and its surroundings

**Day 3:** Male
- Enjoy breakfast at the hotel
- Spend the day at leisure, exploring the island and its surroundings

**Day 4:** Male
- Enjoy breakfast at the hotel
- Spend the day at leisure, exploring the island and its surroundings

**Day 5:** Departure from Male
- After breakfast, check-out from the hotel and transfer to the airport for departure

**Inclusions:**

- Accommodation in a beach villa and water villa
- Meal plan as per selection (full board)
- Return speedboat transfers
- Green tax
- Travel insurance (up to age 60) for the travel duration

**Exclusions:**

- TCS and GST
- International airfare and visa charges
- Guaranteed early check-in or late check-out
- Any expenses of personal nature
- Tips and porterage
- Meals other than what is mentioned in the itinerary
- Drinks including water during meals/sightseeing tours are not included
- RT-PCR test
- Any services not mentioned in the inclusions list

**Highlights of the package:**

- Relaxing days at leisure in the beautiful Maldives
- Enjoying the crystal-clear waters and stunning beaches
- Exploring the island on your own
- Experiencing the luxury and beauty of the Maldives

**Summary:**
The 'Highlights of Scandinavia Fjord Cruise with 4 Nights Denmark (Summer 2024)' package is a 12-day tour that explores the breathtaking landscapes of Scandinavia. The itinerary includes visits to iconic landmarks such as the Great Ocean Road, the Great Barrier Reef, the Sydney Opera House, and the Blue Mountains, as well as a tour of the city of Copenhagen. Participants will enjoy scenic drives, guided tours, and a range of exciting activities, including a jet boat ride, a visit to the famous Sea World, and a hot air balloon ride.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Copenhagen, Meals: Dinner
- Arrive at Copenhagen airport and check-in at the hotel.
- Spend the day acclimatizing to the city and its surroundings.

**Day 2:** Copenhagen Excursion, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Visit the famous Rosklide Cathedral and the Viking Ship Museum.
- Visit the famous Odense city and explore its historic sites.

**Day 3:** Fjord Cruise, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner On-board the Cruise
- Depart from Copenhagen and board your cruise.
- Enjoy the scenic views of the Fjords and the surrounding waters.

**Day 4:** Fjord Cruise, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner On-board the Cruise
- Continue your cruise and enjoy the scenic views of the Fjords.
- Visit the famous city of Bergen and explore its historic sites.

**Day 5:** Fjord Cruise, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner On-board the Cruise
- Continue your cruise and enjoy the scenic views of the Fjords.
- Visit the famous city of Kiel and explore its historic sites.

**Day 6:** Fjord Cruise, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner On-board the Cruise
- Continue your cruise and enjoy the scenic views of the Fjords.
- Visit the famous city of Kiel and explore its historic sites.

**Day 7:** Fjord Cruise, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner On-board the Cruise
- Continue your cruise and enjoy the scenic views of the Fjords.
- Visit the famous city of Kiel and explore its historic sites.

**Day 8:** Fjord Cruise, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner On-board the Cruise
- Continue your cruise and enjoy the scenic views of the Fjords.
- Visit the famous city of Kiel and explore its historic sites.

**Day 9:** Fjord Cruise, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner On-board the Cruise
- Continue your cruise and enjoy the scenic views of the Fjords.
- Visit the famous city of Kiel and explore its historic sites.

**Day 10:** Fjord Cruise, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner On-board the Cruise
- Continue your cruise and enjoy the scenic views of the Fjords.
- Visit the famous city of Kiel and explore its historic sites.

**Day 11:** Copenhagen, Meals: Cruise Breakfast and Dinner
- Disembark from the cruise and proceed for a guided city tour of Copenhagen.
- Visit the famous Parliament building, Amalienborg Palace, Gefion fountain, Little Mermaid statue and many other interesting sights.

**Day 12:** Copenhagen, Meals: Breakfast
- Depart from Copenhagen airport.

**Inclusions:**

- Return economy class group airfare as per the itinerary.
- All local taxes and services as of 1st September, 2023.
- Cost of Visa and Medical Insurance for the duration of the tour.
- Sightseeing and accommodation as per the above-mentioned itinerary.
- All transfers and extensive excursions with entrance fees (as specified in the itinerary) by a deluxe air-conditioned coach.
- Services of a professional, friendly and multilingual Tour Manager or a local Representative (Subject to minimum 15 customers).

**Exclusions:**

- If you wish to travel in advance i.e., before the published departure date as mentioned in the brochure or like to come back on a later date after the tour ends, there will be an additional charge that will be applicable (subject to availability of seats for the given dates & ticket validity) which will be advised to you by our sales staff / travel agent.
- Tipping is expected from anyone providing your service e.g. Coach Driver, Local Guides, Hotel & Restaurant staff etc. It is mandatory to tip a nominal amount of EUR 3 per person/per day.
- Mandatory Gratuities on Cruise of EUR 10 per person per night.
- Cost of Basic Travel Quota equivalent to USD 250,000.
- Any increase in the airfare charged by the airline on your air ticket (presently calculated as on 1st September, 2023).
- Government Taxes as applicable are extra.
- The tour cost does not include POE charges and passport charges.
- No porterage included.
- Any expenses of a personal nature such as porterage, laundry expenses, wines, mineral water, food and drink not in the regular menu provided by us, minibar, telephone calls, etc.
- Meals other than that are mentioned in your itinerary.
- Cost of excursions, city sightseeing, entrance fees and local guides availed of by the passengers, other than that mentioned in your itinerary.
- Private airport transfers, Cost of Suggested / Optional Excursions.
